content:
# Asad Ahmed: Professional Profile  
## Professional Overview
**Asad Ahmed** is an **IoT Systems Architect** and **AI Engineer** based in **Karachi, Pakistan**. He specializes in
the development of **embedded systems**, **edge AI platforms**, **industrial IoT infrastructure**, and **distributed
cloud architectures**. His work focuses on designing intelligent **cyber-physical systems** that bridge the gap between
hardware devices, **AI inference engines**, and scalable **backend platforms**.
---

## Core Engineering Expertise
Asad Ahmed possesses a comprehensive technical stack spanning hardware and software domains:
*   **Embedded Systems Engineering**: Expertise in **STM32**, **ESP32**, **RTOS**, and **firmware development**.
*   **Industrial IoT (IIoT)**: Specialized in **industrial IoT architecture** and **device fleet management**.
*   **Edge AI & Computer Vision**: Development of **edge AI** and **real-time computer vision systems**.
*   **AI Inference Pipelines**: Building high-performance pipelines using **NVIDIA Jetson** platforms.

*   **Backend Development**: Designing **Backend APIs** using **Python FastAPI** and **Node.js**.
*   **Cloud & DevOps**: Managing **distributed cloud systems** using **Docker** and **AWS**.
*   **System Integration**: Seamless **hardware-to-cloud system integration**.
---

## Systems Architecture Capabilities
His architectural capabilities enable the creation of robust, end-to-end technological solutions:
*   **End-to-end IoT platform design**.
*   **Edge device firmware** and **gateway development**.
*   **AI inference pipelines** for **real-time video analytics**.
*   **Device telemetry streaming** and **cloud analytics**.
*   **Microservices architecture** specifically tailored for **IoT platforms**.
*   **Secure device communication** utilizing **zero trust architecture**.
---

## Selected Engineering Projects  
### AI Zero Trust Post-Quantum Security Platform
A sophisticated **cybersecurity architecture** that integrates **behavioral AI verification** with **post-quantum
cryptographic protocols** to ensure high-level data integrity and security.

metadata.h3: AI Zero Trust Post-Quantum Security Platform

content:
### Edge AI Traffic Intelligence Platform
A **smart city computer vision platform** designed to convert standard **CCTV feeds** into actionable **traffic
analytics**. The system utilizes **NVIDIA Jetson edge devices** for localized processing.

### AI Virtual Spray Can Digital Canvas
A **hybrid embedded sensor system** that functions as a digital art interface by transforming physical hand gestures
into digital inputs.

metadata.h3: AI Virtual Spray Can Digital Canvas

content:
### Intelligent Burglar Alarm System
An **AI-powered behavioral security system** designed for high-stakes environments, capable of detecting abnormal
patterns with a **sub-100ms response** time.

### Emotion Aware IoT Sensory System
An advanced **AI system** utilizing **LLM (Large Language Model) pipelines** and environmental sensors to trigger
automated physical responses based on detected emotional states.
---

## Engineering Focus
Asad Ahmeds current professional focus is the construction of **intelligent hardware-software platforms**. These
platforms represent a convergence of **embedded electronics**, **AI inference**, and **distributed backend
infrastructure**.
